app.title: Yousef Abdallah Course
app.subtitle: Build real products with AI, from idea to production
landing.hero.title: The
AI
ships products
while you still
watch.
landing.hero.subtitle: Learn a practical workflow to turn ideas into production-ready apps: PRD, Spec Kit, UI direction, implementation, review, testing, security, SEO, Docker, and deployment.
landing.audience.title: If you are one of these,
landing.audience.accent: you are in the right place
landing.audience.subtitle: Before the technical details, make sure this course is actually built for your situation.

landing.audience.cards.title: Non-technical with an idea
landing.audience.cards.body: If you have a SaaS idea, a landing page, or a small product and want to start without waiting for a full team, this workflow gets you to a first working version fast and in a structured way.

landing.audience.cards.title: A developer who wants speed
landing.audience.cards.body: Work faster with more clarity, without wasting time re-explaining and fixing basics. This course upgrades how you build day-to-day with AI.

landing.audience.cards.title: You know the basics and want a system
landing.audience.cards.body: If you are not a complete beginner but need a clear workflow from idea to production, this is exactly what you will learn.

landing.workflow.eyebrow: Why AI doesn't work for you
landing.workflow.title: It's not you,
it's the
workflow
landing.workflow.subtitle: You don't need to be an AI expert — you need the right workflow.

landing.workflow.items.before: You explain the project from scratch every time. After a while it produces inconsistent code and forgets the decisions you agreed on.
landing.workflow.items.after: CLAUDE.md + Spec Kit make context persistent: structure, decisions, and conventions from the first line to the last.

landing.workflow.items.before: You ask for UI and it gives you something generic that doesn't match what you see in your head, then you spend hours correcting it.
landing.workflow.items.after: Stitch turns your spec into a polished UI in seconds, then Cursor turns it into working code — without touching Figma.

landing.workflow.items.before: As the project grows, AI makes more mistakes and you waste more time — until writing by hand feels faster.
landing.workflow.items.after: Spec Kit breaks any project into focused tasks, so the AI completes each task cleanly without drifting or contradicting itself.

landing.curriculum.subtitle: Not vague headlines or theory. This is the full course map—from planning to a live project on a server that deploys automatically.
landing.curriculum.introText: Every phase has a clear goal, specific tools, and a real output you ship. After the course you won’t just understand the workflow—you’ll be able to apply it to your project immediately.

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Before you write a line of code
landing.curriculum.cards.body: Turn any idea into a complete planning document + technical map that the AI can follow from the first conversation—without guessing or drifting.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: A complete PRD + a clear execution direction

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Full UI before code
landing.curriculum.cards.body: Generate real HTML screens with Stitch, then convert them into real components—no time wasted between mockups and mismatched code.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: All screens ready to become working code

landing.curriculum.cards.title: A cheap model that builds correctly
landing.curriculum.cards.body: With a clear spec, the AI doesn’t need to “think”. Build fast, reduce token usage, and ship features that actually connect together.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: Frontend + backend working on real data

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Claude reviews, another model executes
landing.curriculum.cards.body: Know when to let Claude produce a review + TODO list, and when to let another model write E2E tests—so you move fast without dropping quality.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: Cleaner code + critical paths covered by tests

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Fast and secure before anyone sees it
landing.curriculum.cards.body: A full security audit + performance tuning to Lighthouse 90+, so the project is production-ready before launch.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: Faster product + fewer vulnerabilities + higher confidence

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Get traffic and track conversion
landing.curriculum.cards.body: Technical SEO + Meta Pixel + GA4, so the product is not only working—but measurable and ready for traffic and conversions.

landing.curriculum.cards.title: Live project with automatic updates
landing.curriculum.cards.body: Docker containers + CI/CD + server deploy. This closes the loop: from an idea in your head to a live product that updates with every push.
landing.curriculum.cards.output: A live project + a complete code-to-production pipeline

landing.curriculum.footerMicro: Not just an AI course. A complete workflow you can reuse on every project.
landing.timeline.subtitle: 7 sequential stages. Each stage builds on the previous one and ends with a real output.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Think before you code
landing.timeline.phases.body: Before you write a line of code, AI helps you build a full PRD with the details: users, features, scope, and technical decisions.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Break the project into steps
landing.timeline.phases.body: Claude Code works like a project manager: turns the project into sprints and structured tasks with simple commands ready to run.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Test every stage
landing.timeline.phases.body: After each stage, validate that features actually work before moving on—so you don't get surprises at the end.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Make sure everything is correct
landing.timeline.phases.body: Claude Code reviews your code and surfaces issues and improvements before you build on the wrong foundation.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Your app updates itself
landing.timeline.phases.body: Codex automates testing and deployment and ensures everything works—without you doing it by hand.

landing.timeline.phases.title: Secure and protected
landing.timeline.phases.body: Claude Code runs a full security audit, finds vulnerabilities, and closes them before the project goes to production.

landing.timeline.phases.title: SEO + Production
landing.timeline.phases.body: Prepare the project for SEO, connect domain/hosting, and deploy it to the server so it's live and running.
landing.timeline.phases.output: A live project on the internet

landing.numbers.subtitle: This workflow has been tested with 30+ developers across 50+ real projects.
landing.numbers.cards.developers.desc: Tried the workflow and changed how they work end-to-end.
landing.numbers.cards.projects.desc: Real projects across different types, from landing pages to full SaaS.
landing.numbers.cards.bugs.desc: Fewer bugs thanks to integrated code review + testing in the workflow.
landing.numbers.cards.delivery.desc: Same project, same quality—this workflow saves 75%+ of the time.

landing.numbers.credibility.items.title: Repeatable workflow
landing.numbers.credibility.items.subtitle: For any project and any stack

landing.pricing.subtitle: The Early Access price is available for the first 30 reservations only—then it returns to the original price.
landing.pricing.guarantee.title: If you follow the steps and apply the workflow seriously, but still can’t ship the app idea in your head—you get your money back.
landing.pricing.guarantee.body: This guarantee is for people who actually execute (not quick skimming). The goal is a real result on your project—not theoretical content.

landing.pricing.cards.title: The full course
landing.pricing.cards.description: All 7 phases. Learn the workflow and apply it yourself.

landing.pricing.cards.title: Course + review session
landing.pricing.cards.description: The full workflow + one 1:1 review session with me for your real project. If you work alone you may waste time—this cuts the path.
landing.pricing.cards.priceNote: One session can save you months of confusion

landing.pricing.cards.title: Course + 1 month follow-up
landing.pricing.cards.soldOutBody:
This package is closed for this month.
Full course + weekly sessions for a month. It opens again when a new cohort is available.
features: A complete project plan with you from day one

landing.faq.subtitle: If you can’t find your answer, message me directly on WhatsApp.

landing.faq.items.q: Is this workflow good for me if I’m non-technical?
landing.faq.items.a: Yes—100%. The course starts from zero and explains everything even if you don’t know what Git is. Anytime you feel stuck, you can message me on WhatsApp directly.

landing.faq.items.q: I’m a frontend developer—will it help me?
landing.faq.items.a: Yes. You’ll learn a workflow that makes UI direction, task breakdown, review, testing, and production steps consistent—so you ship faster with fewer rewrites.

landing.faq.items.q: I’m just starting to learn programming—should I take it?
landing.faq.items.a: If you’re a complete beginner, you can still take it—but you’ll get the best results if you have basic fundamentals (HTML/CSS/JS and simple Git).

landing.faq.items.q: I own a business and have a SaaS/app idea—will it help?
landing.faq.items.a: Yes. The workflow is designed to turn your idea into a clear PRD + executable tasks, so you can validate and ship a real version instead of staying in “planning forever”.

landing.faq.items.q: When does the course start and where is the content?
landing.faq.items.a: Access is online. After successful payment, your access is activated inside your account and you can start immediately.

landing.faq.items.q: If I don’t like it—do you have a guarantee?
landing.faq.items.a: Yes. If you follow the steps seriously and still can’t get a real result, contact me and we’ll review your case fairly.

landing.faq.form.title: Ask your question on WhatsApp
landing.faq.form.hint: Write your question here and it will open WhatsApp with the message ready to send.

about.title: About the Instructor
about.subtitle: Learn the workflow behind real AI-built products
about.bio: Yousef teaches the practical system he uses to move from raw idea to deployed application: planning, UI direction, AI-assisted implementation, review, security, SEO, Docker, and production delivery.
about.credentials: AI workflow builder · Full-stack delivery · Production-focused training
about.philosophy: The course is built around one idea: AI becomes useful when the workflow is clear. Every lesson turns a messy step into a repeatable system you can use on your own projects.

faq.items.workflow.q: What exactly will I learn in this course?
faq.items.workflow.a: You'll learn a complete 7-phase workflow: planning with PRDs and specs, UI direction before code, Spec Kit implementation, AI code review and E2E tests, security and performance hardening, SEO and tracking, then Docker deployment with CI/CD.
faq.items.prerequisites.q: Do I need to be an expert to take this course?
faq.items.prerequisites.a: You do not need to be an AI expert, but this is not for someone who has never touched programming. It is best for non-technical founders with strong product focus, beginners with basics, and developers who want a repeatable workflow.
faq.items.guarantee.q: What if I don't like the course or it doesn't work for me?
faq.items.guarantee.a: If the course is not a fit, contact support within the first 7 days. The goal is for serious students to get real value, not to keep people in the wrong program.
faq.items.lifetime.q: Will I have lifetime access to the course?
faq.items.lifetime.a: Yes. Pay once and get lifetime access to all course materials, recordings, and any future updates at no additional cost.
